category_sources: Official SPAdes site describes SPAdes as a toolkit for assembling and analyzing sequencing data.
display_name_sources: Official site title is SPAdes Assembly Toolkit and GitHub About identifies SPAdes Genome Assembler.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official SPAdes documentation site with quick start, installation, input data, command-line options, and output pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already populated; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official SPAdes site describes genome, metagenomic, transcriptomic, plasmid, and viral assembly modes; source_facts.executables lists SPAdes command-line tools.
